mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (order_no, user_id, activity_id, activity_name, product_id, product_name, product_image, seckill_price, quantity, status, create_time, pay_expire_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{record.orderNo}, #{record.userId}, #{record.activityId}, #{record.activityName}, #{record.productId}, #{record.productName}, #{record.productImage}, #{record.seckillPrice}, #{record.quantity}, #{record.status}, #{record.createTime}, #{record.payExpireTime}, NOW(), 0)
